category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance versus Colombia (RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ) and radio-approval conditions.

title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Colombia regulatory requirements under RETIE, RETILAP, and RETIQ, including mandatory ONAC-accredited certification, SIC Certificate of Conformity, SEC-like importer role, and R-600a refrigerant handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与哥伦比亚 RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ 下要求对照，包括认证机构认证、SIC合格证、进口商责任角色及制冷剂要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與哥倫比亞 RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ 下要求對照，包括認證機構認證、SIC合格證、進口商責任角色及製冷劑要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-entry approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Colombian ministry issuances, ONAC accreditation scope, SIC procedures, and radio-frequency approval requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商应在出货或销售前，使用合格专业人士核验哥伦比亚现行部委文件、ONAC认证范围、SIC程序与射频审批要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商應在出貨或銷售前，以合格專業人士核驗哥倫比亞現行部委文件、ONAC認證範圍、SIC程序與射頻審批要求。

answer_first.en: For refrigerators, Colombian entry is governed by ONAC-linked safety and conformity pathways aligned with RETIE and RETILAP, plus RETIQ product energy-labelling and SIC enforcement. The biggest practical differences from China are that CCC is not accepted as the destination-market conformity route, electrical safety is assessed against Colombia's adopted IEC basis under NTC/RIE references, the in-country importer must carry the product-file ownership duties, and port clearance is typically handled through Cartagena or Buenaventura. The refrigerator anchor R-600a is common and generally workable, but charge/documentation verification remains mandatory. Colombia uses a 110/220 V, 60 Hz nominal electrical supply, which differs from China and may require design or markings updates when models are currently built for 220/380 V, 50 Hz. Colombia does not have a broad EU-style battery-regulation or outdoor-noise regime for household refrigerators.
answer_first.zh: 对家用电冰箱而言，哥伦比亚合规以ONAC关联的电气安全与一致性路径为核心，覆盖 RETIE、RETILAP 和 RETIQ，SIC负责编制及执法。与中国主要差异在于CCC不能作为目的地合规凭证，电气安全评估按哥伦比亚采用的 NTC/RIE 与 IEC 体系执行，本地进口商承担产品文件责任，清关通常经由卡塔赫纳（Cartagena）或布埃纳文图拉（Buenaventura）港口。制冷剂锚点 R-600a 在中国与目标市场普遍一致，可采用，但充注量和文件仍须逐机型核验。哥伦比亚额定电源为110/220 V、60 Hz，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz不同，可能触发设计、标称参数或附件改造。哥伦比亚对冰箱不存在类欧盟的横向电池或户外噪声市场监管制度。
answer_first.zht: 對家用電冰箱而言，哥倫比亞合規以 ONAC 關聯之電氣安全與一致性路徑為核心，涵蓋 RETIE、RETILAP 與 RETIQ，SIC負責審核及執法。與中國主要差異在於 CCC 不能作為目的地合規憑證，電氣安全評估按哥倫比亞採用之 NTC/RIE 與 IEC 體系執行，本地進口商承擔產品文件責任，清關通常經由卡塔赫納（Cartagena）或布埃納文圖拉（Buenaventura）港口。制冷劑錨點 R-600a 在中國與目的地普遍一致，可採用，但充注量和文件仍須逐機型核驗。哥倫比亞額定電源為110/220 V、60 Hz，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz不同，可能導致設計、標稱參數或附件調整。哥倫比亞對冰箱不存在類歐盟的橫向電池或戶外噪音制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Use official ministry pages, ONAC, ICONTEC, SIC, CRC/ANE, and customs references; local commercial portals are insufficient.
